zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Greene於1583年10月13日出生在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德時，她的父親Mark Greene23歲，母親Jane Fitch20歲。她於1602年5月與William Henry George在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1628年在英國英格蘭艾可萊特爾享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可萊特爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Greene于1583年10月13日出生在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德时，她的父亲Mark Greene23岁，母亲Jane Fitch20岁。她于1602年5月与William Henry George在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1628年在英国英格兰艾可萊特爾享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可萊特爾。

nameMeanings.name: Greene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Green  . In North America, this surname has assimilated cognates from other languages.

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Greene was born on 13 October 1583, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, her father, Mark Greene, was 23 and her mother, Jane Fitch, was 20. She married William Henry George in May 1602, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1628, in Writtle, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Writtle, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Greene est née le 13 octobre 1583, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Mark Greene, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Jane Fitch, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Henry George en mai 1602, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1628, à Writtle, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Writtle, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Greene am 13. Oktober 1583 in Chelmsford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mark Greene 23 und ihre Mutter Jane Fitch 20. Sie hat im Mai 1602 in Essex, England William Henry George geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1628 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Writtle, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Writtle, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Greene è nata il il 13 ottobre 1583 nel Chelmsford, Essex, England, sua padre, Mark Greene, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Jane Fitch, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William Henry George nel maggio 1602, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1628, nel Writtle, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Writtle, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Greeneが1583年10月13日にイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードで生まれた時，父Mark Greeneは23歳，母Jane Fitchは20歳であった。1602年5月にイギリスエセックスでWilliam Henry Georgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1628年にイギリスイギリスエセックスウリットルで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスウリットルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Greene(이)가 1583년 10월 13일 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mark Greene(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Fitch(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1602년 5월 영국 에세스에서 William Henry George(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1628년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Greene nasceu em 13 de outubro de 1583, em Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Mark Greene, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jane Fitch, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Henry George em maio de 1602, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1628, em Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Greene родилась 13 октября 1583 г. в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Mark Greene было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Fitch, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Henry George май 1602 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1628 г. в местности риттл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности риттл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Greene nació el 13 de octubre de 1583, en Chelmsford, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Mark Greene, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Jane Fitch, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William Henry George en mayo de 1602, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1628, en Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
